title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for interacting with the Ollama server; chat, generate embeddings, pull models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via a simple API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, dark mode).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs for chat, embeddings, and model ops.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Lightweight Node CLI wrapper around the Ollama REST API for quick chat and model pulls.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension bringing local LLM code completions via Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: GPT4All chat UI that can optionally connect to an Ollama backend for local model inference.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app that talks to Ollama over its REST API.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and persistent storage.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama HTTP API with Tokio.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-run Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, Open WebUI, and GPU runtime flags.
